text.title: Ai Powered Pm Tools — Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Existing platform + ≥10 seats + named buyer + approved budget?

branch.when: existing_platform == true AND seats >= 10 AND named_buyer == true AND budget_approved == true
branch.conclusion: Run the selection: evaluate incumbent AI-tier first; switch only if uplift fails the ROI gate.
Skip. Per-seat uplift seldom pays back at this scale.
